allow: Bash(echo "=== Testing Backend APIs ===" && echo "" && echo "1. Status:" && curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8001/status | jq -r '.state, .mock_mode' && echo "" && echo "2. Runtime Truth:" && curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8001/runtime/truth | jq -r '.voice_runtime_mode, .face_runtime_mode' && echo "" && echo "3. Products \(affiliate fields\):" && curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8001/products | jq '.[0] | {name, commission_rate, affiliate_links}' && echo "" && echo "4. Ops Summary:" && curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8001/ops/summary | jq -r '.overall_status, .voice_status')

Bash(echo "=== Testing Backend APIs ===" && echo "" && echo "1. Status:" && curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8001/status | python -m json.tool | head -10 && echo "" && echo "2. Products \(affiliate fields\):" && curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8001/products | python -m json.tool | head -20 && echo "" && echo "3. Ops Summary:" && curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8001/ops/summary | python -m json.tool | head -15)

Bash(curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8001/docs | grep -o 'href="/docs"' | head -1 && echo "API Docs accessible" || echo "Checking openapi.json..." && curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8001/openapi.json | python -c "import sys, json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Available endpoints:'\); [print\(f'  {method.upper\(\)} {path}'\) for path, methods in sorted\(data['paths'].items\(\)\) for method in methods.keys\(\)]" 2>&1 | head -30)

Bash(echo "=== Testing Backend APIs ===" && echo "" && echo "1. Status:" && curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/status | python -m json.tool | head -10 && echo "" && echo "2. Products \(with affiliate fields\):" && curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/products | python -m json.tool | head -25 && echo "" && echo "3. Runtime Truth:" && curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/runtime/truth | python -m json.tool | head -15)
